body.generated_test_code:
from __future__ import annotations

from sentinel_alpha.infra.generated_sources.demo_provider import DemoProviderSource


def test_demo_provider_adapter_builds_query_paths(monkeypatch) -> None:
    adapter = DemoProviderSource(base_url="https://api.example.com")
    calls = []

    def fake_request(path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> dict:
        calls.append((path, params or {}))
        return {"ok": True, "path": path, "params": params or {}}

    adapter._request_json = fake_request  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    adapter.fetch_quote("AAPL")
    adapter.fetch_history("AAPL", interval="1d", lookback="1mo")

    assert len(calls) == 2
    assert calls[0][1]["symbol"] == "AAPL"
    assert calls[1][1]["interval"] == "1d"

Write the following module code:
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from urllib.parse import urlencode
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen


class DemoProviderSource:
    """Generated adapter for demo-provider.\n\n    Docs summary: Demo provider docs summary\n    Docs URL: https://docs.example.com\n    """

    def __init__(self, base_url: str | None = None, timeout_seconds: int = 10) -> None:
        self.base_url = (base_url or "https://api.example.com").rstrip("/")
        self.api_keys = [os.getenv(name, "") for name in ['DEMO_API_KEY']]
        self.api_key = next((value for value in self.api_keys if value), "")
        self.timeout_seconds = timeout_seconds

    def _request_json(self, path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> dict:
        params = dict(params or {})
        # Replace with provider-specific auth/header handling if the docs require it.
        url = f"{self.base_url}/{path.lstrip('/')}"
        if params:
            url = f"{url}?{urlencode(params)}"
        request = Request(url, headers={"User-Agent": "Sentinel-Alpha/0.1"})
        with urlopen(request, timeout=self.timeout_seconds) as response:
            payload = response.read().decode("utf-8")
        return json.loads(payload)

    def fetch_quote(self, symbol: str) -> dict:
        return self._request_json(
            "/v1/quote",
            {"symbol": symbol},
        )

    def fetch_history(self, symbol: str, interval: str = "1d", lookback: str = "6mo") -> dict:
        return self._request_json(
            "/v1/quote",
            {"symbol": symbol, "interval": interval, "lookback": lookback},
        )

body.generated_test_code:
from __future__ import annotations

from sentinel_alpha.infra.generated_terminals.demo_terminal import DemoTerminalTerminalAdapter


def test_terminal_demo_terminal_adapter_routes_order_and_position_calls() -> None:
    adapter = DemoTerminalTerminalAdapter(base_url="https://api.example.com")
    calls = []

    def fake_request(method: str, path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None, payload: dict | None = None) -> dict:
        calls.append((method, path, params or {}, payload or {}))
        return {"ok": True, "method": method, "path": path, "payload": payload or {}}

    adapter._request_json = fake_request  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    adapter.place_order("AAPL", "buy", 100, order_type="limit", limit_price=195.5)
    adapter.fetch_order_status("ORD-1")
    adapter.cancel_order("ORD-1")
    adapter.fetch_positions()
    adapter.fetch_balances()

    assert len(calls) == 5
    assert calls[0][0] == "POST"
    assert calls[0][3]["symbol"] == "AAPL"
    assert calls[1][2]["order_id"] == "ORD-1"
    assert calls[2][3]["order_id"] == "ORD-1"
    assert calls[3][0] == "GET"
    assert calls[4][0] == "GET"

from __future__ import annotations

from sentinel_alpha.infra.generated_sources.demo_provider import DemoProviderSource


def test_demo_provider_adapter_builds_query_paths(monkeypatch) -> None:
    adapter = DemoProviderSource(base_url="https://api.example.com")
    calls = []

    def fake_request(path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> dict:
        calls.append((path, params or {}))
        return {"ok": True, "path": path, "params": params or {}}

    adapter._request_json = fake_request  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    adapter.fetch_quote("AAPL")
    adapter.fetch_history("AAPL", interval="1d", lookback="1mo")

    assert len(calls) == 2
    assert calls[0][1]["symbol"] == "AAPL"
    assert calls[1][1]["interval"] == "1d"

Target test: tests/generated/test_demo_provider.py

Write the following module code:
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from urllib.parse import urlencode
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen


class DemoProviderSource:
    """Generated adapter for demo-provider.\n\n    Docs summary: Demo provider docs summary\n    Docs URL: https://docs.example.com\n    """

    def __init__(self, base_url: str | None = None, timeout_seconds: int = 10) -> None:
        self.base_url = (base_url or "https://api.example.com").rstrip("/")
        self.api_keys = [os.getenv(name, "") for name in ['DEMO_API_KEY']]
        self.api_key = next((value for value in self.api_keys if value), "")
        self.timeout_seconds = timeout_seconds

    def _request_json(self, path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> dict:
        params = dict(params or {})
        # Replace with provider-specific auth/header handling if the docs require it.
        url = f"{self.base_url}/{path.lstrip('/')}"
        if params:
            url = f"{url}?{urlencode(params)}"
        request = Request(url, headers={"User-Agent": "Sentinel-Alpha/0.1"})
        with urlopen(request, timeout=self.timeout_seconds) as response:
            payload = response.read().decode("utf-8")
        return json.loads(payload)

    def fetch_quote(self, symbol: str) -> dict:
        return self._request_json(
            "/v1/quote",
            {"symbol": symbol},
        )

    def fetch_history(self, symbol: str, interval: str = "1d", lookback: str = "6mo") -> dict:
        return self._request_json(
            "/v1/quote",
            {"symbol": symbol, "interval": interval, "lookback": lookback},
        )

terminal_integration_runs.generated_test_code:
from __future__ import annotations

from sentinel_alpha.infra.generated_terminals.demo_terminal import DemoTerminalTerminalAdapter


def test_terminal_demo_terminal_adapter_routes_order_and_position_calls() -> None:
    adapter = DemoTerminalTerminalAdapter(base_url="https://api.example.com")
    calls = []

    def fake_request(method: str, path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None, payload: dict | None = None) -> dict:
        calls.append((method, path, params or {}, payload or {}))
        return {"ok": True, "method": method, "path": path, "payload": payload or {}}

    adapter._request_json = fake_request  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    adapter.place_order("AAPL", "buy", 100, order_type="limit", limit_price=195.5)
    adapter.fetch_order_status("ORD-1")
    adapter.cancel_order("ORD-1")
    adapter.fetch_positions()
    adapter.fetch_balances()

    assert len(calls) == 5
    assert calls[0][0] == "POST"
    assert calls[0][3]["symbol"] == "AAPL"
    assert calls[1][2]["order_id"] == "ORD-1"
    assert calls[2][3]["order_id"] == "ORD-1"
    assert calls[3][0] == "GET"
    assert calls[4][0] == "GET"
